overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a misty mountain forest, navigating rocky terrain, passing a waterfall, and wading through a stream at the cliff edge. The environment features dense pine forests, large boulders, and dramatic overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail with fallen timber

agents.ego_description: running steadily uphill through the forest trail, navigating around natural obstacles

entered.detail: Dense forest of tall evergreen pine trees lining the path
Fog-shrouded mountain peaks visible through the trees
Large fallen tree trunk with reddish bark lying beside the path
Bushes with distinctive red foliage flanking the trail
Narrow dirt trail with scattered rocks and roots winding uphill

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense mountain forest with tall pine trees and misty peaks in the background. Aloy runs steadily uphill along a narrow dirt trail flanked by red vegetation, passing a large fallen tree trunk on the right. The atmosphere is cool and overcast with diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with large boulder formations

events.description: trail becomes rockier with large boulders appearing on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing to run uphill through increasingly rocky terrain with larger stone formations

entered.detail: Massive gray rock boulders scattered along the trail sides
Steep rock cliff face visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The trail opens slightly as Aloy runs through rockier terrain, with large gray boulders now dominating the landscape. The fallen log is left behind as the path becomes more gravelly and steep, with cliff faces becoming visible through the sparse tree cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with vertical rock face

events.description: mountain goat appears on the rocks to the right of the path
character begins climbing up rocks beside the waterfall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall and climbing up the rocky ledge beside it

notable_agents.action: mountain goat standing on rocks beside the trail, watching the character pass

entered.detail: Tall waterfall cascading down the rock face ahead

segments.scene_description: Aloy reaches a dramatic waterfall cascading down a cliff face. A mountain goat stands on the rocks to the right, observing her approach. She begins climbing the rocky ledge beside the waterfall, transitioning from running to ascending the wet stone surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain stream at cliff edge with valley vista

events.description: character enters the shallow stream at the top of the waterfall
character wades through water and continues running along the ridge

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow mountain stream at the cliff edge and continuing along the rocky ridge

entered.detail: Shallow flowing water stream at the top of the waterfall
Expansive view of the deep valley and distant mountains below the cliff
Bare dead tree trunk standing on the ridge

segments.scene_description: Having climbed to the top of the waterfall, Aloy wades through the shallow stream that feeds it, with the waterfall now behind her. The landscape opens to reveal a breathtaking valley vista to the left, with sparse trees and rocky terrain along the cliff edge as she continues running forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty mountain forest that gradually opens into a breathtaking cliffside vista. It begins with Aloy running uphill along a narrow dirt trail flanked by red vegetation and tall pine trees under a cool, overcast sky. As the path becomes steeper and more gravelly, the dense forest thins to reveal a landscape dominated by large gray boulders and looming cliff faces. The scene then shifts as she reaches a cascading waterfall, passing a mountain goat on the rocks before transitioning from a run to a climb up the wet stone surface. Finally, having ascended the ledge, she wades through a shallow stream that feeds the falls, moving forward as the terrain opens to reveal a vast valley vista to the left.
